title: Forged Optimizations
description: A lightweight optimisation modpack for forge.
body:
A Lightweight modpack that optimizes the game to drastically improve performance and fps.

Showcase Trailer: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RwvkKOFBgwQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Join my discord to recommend mods, modpacks, texture packs, resource packs and get updates on different things I do.

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/zrCyu5cZPX)

Use of this modpack to contribute to other modpacks is allowed, but please credit the use of this modpack.
